name: East Java (Indonesia)
description: A green field charged at the centre with the complex.
history: Used by the Provincial Government of East Java; the coat of arms includes the Tugu Pahlawan monument referencing the Battle of Surabaya (1945).

features.symbolism: the field of the East Java provincial flag, charged with the provincial coat of arms

features.role: Coat of arms of East Java
features.symbolism: shield with East Javan icons — rice ears, cotton, mountains (Mt. Semeru), sea, and the Tugu Pahlawan monument
